scripts.build: cd frond && npm install && npx vite build && cd .. && mkdir -p camp-manager-backend/backend/public && cp -r frond/dist/. camp-manager-backend/backend/public/ && cd camp-manager-backend/backend && npm install --include=dev && npx prisma generate && npm run build
scripts.start: cd camp-manager-backend/backend && npx prisma migrate deploy && npm start
